title: More of Mine
description: This mod adds new dimension, new advancements, villager profession, potion of defense.
body:
**This mod doesn't have a specific theme, I add whatever I want to add.**

This mod adds:
1. New advancements, for example, you need to collect every item related to gold, or climb to the highest point in the world using scaffolding.
2. New villager profession - DJ. He sells music discs and materials for note block and jukebox.
3. Miner World - a new dimension made entirely of mines.
4. Key bind - N, which toggles Night Vision effect.
5. Potion of Defense - grants extra protection points (like armor).
*It's better to use the Management Wanted mod, but it's not necessary.
